comments_made.comment: Acknowledged bug, noted PR #1586 by immu4989 fixes ConfounderDistributionInterpreter categorical crash
Linked PR #1594 as fix for estimate_effect UnboundLocalError when method_name=None
Informed that random_state fix (#1556) is now merged in main

Fixed CausalModel.do() bugs; linked fix branch
Explained DML CIs via EconML effect_inference/population_summary
CI fully green, ready to merge
Found TAGS env var crash; fix PR submitted
NDE fix in main, suggested closure
Noted external data dep and docs indexing
Noted merge conflict; pointed to #1563 and new rebase PR

notes: .github/ is protected - cannot push CI workflow changes.
PR #1432 (Delta method CI) - rebased June 2026. Only DCO check shown; awaiting maintainer CI approval.
PR #1577 (metric_params fix) should be CLOSED - superseded by merged contributor PR #1563.
PR #1533 (one_hot_encode index) may need closing - contributor PR #1546 with same fix was MERGED.
PR #1594: fix - raise ValueError in estimate_effect when method_name=None (closes #365). Created 2026-06-20. Open.

New PR created 2026-06-20: fix(graph_refuter): dtype detection using pd.api.types.is_integer_dtype() to handle int8, uint8, bool, etc. Branch: repo-assist/fix-graph-refuter-dtype-detection-20260620. PR number TBD.
PR #1592: Dependabot security update - undici 7.28.0 (7 CVEs, 3 High). Open, awaiting maintainer merge.

New contributor PRs: #1586 (immu4989 - ConfounderDistributionInterpreter cat crash, pending), #1589 (TasfinMahmud - out-of-bounds interventions, maintainer reviewing), #1590 (scipy bound relax, open).
All open issues have RA comments as of 2026-06-20.
